Fulham boss rules out Muniz exit after West Ham are linked with striker
arts.sum: Marco Silva has insisted that Fulham have no intention of selling Rodrigo Muniz. It comes amid reports that West Ham are interested in the Brazilian striker, who joined Fulham during the summer of 2021. Whites boss Silva said the club had not received any approach for Muniz and added: “We are not open to listening […] The post Fulham boss rules out Muniz exit after West Ham are linked with striker appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Sources: West Ham were just offered chance to sign £11.6m striker compared to Jamie Vardy but never responded
Potter on Fulham reflections, learning every day and stopping Crystal Palace
arts.sum: I think he’s [Lucas Paquetá] the type of player who needs to feel how important he is to the team. There are rarely any gifts in the Premier League, and with what happened with two of the goals on Tuesday, I think they were a result of our pressure, and forcing mistakes.
